use_cases: Full-screen animated hero backgrounds for landing pages
Interactive decorative backgrounds for tech-focused websites
Visually engaging page sections for SaaS dashboards
ai_summary: A Three.js-based animated shader component that renders a cyberpunk-style cybernetic grid with mouse-reactive warping effects. The GLSL fragment shader creates pulsing energy lines and grid patterns that respond to cursor movement, producing an immersive futuristic visual suitable for hero sections or decorative backgrounds on tech-oriented applications.
